message:
feat(sdk): expand public API with tool factories, extension accessors, RPC extensions, and comprehensive tests

Tool factory functions:
- Add `create_{read,bash,edit,write,grep,find,ls}_tool(cwd)` factory
  functions that return `Box<dyn Tool>` for each built-in tool type
- `create_all_tools(cwd)` returns all 7 built-in tools in canonical order
- `tool_to_definition()` converts a Tool trait object into a ToolDefinition
- `all_tool_definitions(cwd)` returns ToolDefinition schemas for all tools
- `BUILTIN_TOOL_NAMES` constant for the canonical tool name list
- Imported BashTool, EditTool, FindTool, GrepTool, LsTool, ReadTool,
  WriteTool from crate::tools

Visibility changes on EventListeners:
- `EventSubscriber` type alias now `pub`
- `subscribe()`, `unsubscribe()`, `notify()`, `notify_tool_start()`,
  `notify_tool_end()`, `notify_stream_event()` all promoted from
  `fn` to `pub fn` to support external embedding scenarios

New public types and methods:
- `RpcExtensionUiResponse` — tagged enum (Value/Confirmed/Cancelled)
  for extension UI dialog responses, with serde round-trip support
- `AgentSessionHandle::from_session_with_listeners()` — const fn
  constructor for tests and advanced embedding
- `AgentSessionHandle::extension_ui_response()` — RPC method for
  resolving extension UI prompts
- `AgentSessionHandle::prompt_with_options()` — extended prompt with
  optional images and streaming behavior control
- `AgentSessionHandle::has_extensions()`, `extension_manager()`,
  `extension_region()` — extension introspection accessors
- Re-export ExtensionManager, ExtensionPolicy, ExtensionRegion

Minor fixes:
- Remove unused `json!` import from serde_json (replaced with Map ops)
- Update default model assertion from claude-sonnet-4 to claude-opus-4-5

New tests in src/sdk.rs:
- 11 tool factory tests: correct names, descriptions, parameter schemas,
  create_all returns 7, order matches BUILTIN_TOOL_NAMES, registry from
  factory tools
- has_extensions_false_by_default test

New tests in tests/sdk_api.rs:
- RpcExtensionUiResponse trait bounds (Clone+Debug+Send+Sync)
- Serde round-trip for extension UI response
- Full RPC subprocess bridge test with shell script mock: validates
  get_state, get_available_models, set_model, prompt_with_options,
  extension_ui_response through a real subprocess transport

New test file tests/sdk_unit.rs (1541 lines):
- Comprehensive SDK unit tests covering callback ordering, transport
  adapter behavior, cancellation semantics, RPC type serialization,
  and extension-policy interactions with structured JSONL log output

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
